title: The Darkworld Dimension
description: This datapacks add a new dimension, a new biome, a new enchant, a new block, new mobs and flying boots!
body:
Area Protection (datapack/mod) required!!!
No resources pack required!

# What it adds

Portals to access this dimension can be found in the overworld! To exit, you need to find another portal in the darkworld

New structures:

- Swamp Temple (where can be found the gigantic enchant book)
- Haunted Ship (where can be found the craft for the new boots, and the unbreakable elytra)
- Haunted House


New dimension:

The Darkworld (portals made out of purple stone can be found in the overworld)

New mobs:

- Ghosts (they are blue, and are roaming around haunted ships in the darkworld, and haunted house in cold biomes)
- Knight (a giant armored piglin)

New items:
- Pegasus Boots (they are flying boots, but you can only fly from a point A to B, without going up or down!)
- Darkworld elytra (unbreakable elytra)

New enchant:
- Gigantic I, II (this enchant for helmet makes you slightly bigger. Can only be found in swamp temples)


New block:
Purple stone (used in darkworld portal, unbreakable)
